title: HeadyBot — Conversational AI for Web, Slack, Discord & Teams
description: Deploy HeadyBot on any platform in minutes. Embeddable web widget, Slack, Discord, and Microsoft Teams support with persistent context memory, custom personas, live handoff, and enterprise SSO.
ogDescription: Enterprise-ready conversational AI for web, Slack, Discord, and Teams. Context memory, custom personas, live handoff, and no-code builder.
